title: Vetta GR-1 — precision grinder
prompt: A product page for a machined, buy-it-for-life single-dose coffee grinder. Industrial, honest, anti-subscription. Show me how it's built.

direction.name: Assembly line
direction.thesis: A dark workshop-manual product page where the grinder assembles itself part by part as you scroll — engineering as the sales pitch, safety-orange callouts as the only decoration.
direction.signature: Scroll-driven exploded-view assembly: eleven SVG parts fly in along mechanical axes, bidirectionally scrubbed by scroll, with stage-synced spec captions.
